paper_title: IDCIA: Immunocytochemistry Dataset for Cellular Image Analysis
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (Config, PIL, albumentations, click, cv2, data_loader, dataset, h5py, looper, matplotlib (+15 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: IDCIA/FCRN_A/requirements.txt, IDCIA/CNN Reg/environment.yml
